song.title: Thank You Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] Grace that flows like a river Washing over me Fount of heaven, love of Christ Overflow in me
[C] Thank You Jesus, You set me free Christ my Savior, You rescued me
[V2] Take this life delivered A vessel of Your love Wholly now devoted To see Your Kingdom come
[B] You've given me life You've opened my eyes I love You Lord I love You Lord You've entered my heart You've set me apart I love You Lord I love You Lord
